case_title: JOE NIAN ZU LIANG ET AL VS. ANDRE LUIS VIEIRA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-18-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS JOE NIAN ZU LIANG AND CONNIE YIN PING LUK BOTH ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER TERRANCE CHOY. THE NON-CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH BY THE COURT CLERK R.SAHATJIAN. DEFENDANT ANDRE LUIS VIEIRA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

TRIAL RESET TO MAR-05-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-18-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA WOODSON; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
